# marshall houston

> personal site of marshall houston — thoughts on engineering leadership, ai-augmented software engineering, and building teams. exploratory writing, ideas in flight, and tools.

voice is lowercase, fragmented, first-person. exploratory not conclusive. cross-domain references are a feature.

## writing
- [latest posts](https://marshallhouston.wtf/): essays and notes
- [archive](https://marshallhouston.wtf/year-archive/): everything chronological
- [tags](https://marshallhouston.wtf/tags/): browse by topic

## about
- [about](https://marshallhouston.wtf/about/): who marshall is

## machine-readable
- [sitemap](https://marshallhouston.wtf/sitemap.xml)
